description: Machine-level setup manifest. Bootstrap reads this on every startup.

startup_scripts.name: TechAI-StartupCatchUp
startup_scripts.description: Catch up missed daily briefs and launch Ralphs

ralphs.name: Ralph-TechAI
ralphs.prompt: You are Ralph watching techai-explained. Read STATUS.md first. Check issues, PRs, CI. Generate daily briefs if missing. Act autonomously.

ralphs.name: Ralph-JellyBolt
ralphs.prompt: You are Ralph watching jellybolt-games. Read STATUS.md first. Check issues, PRs, game status. Act autonomously.

ralphs.name: Ralph-ContentEmpire
ralphs.prompt: You are Ralph watching content-empire. Read STATUS.md first. Check issues, PRs, article status. Act autonomously.
